text:
There once was a teen name Sam. He liked skateboarding but his best friend wasn’t into it at all. One day he met this guy named Wes. Wes seemed cool with everything. Sam went Skateboarding with him.

Wes kicked him off a bigboard. Sam was fine. He slid. Wes laughed. He said they got better than that. They stood. He jumped. He did tricks. Sam liked it. They hung out. Wes taught him about snowboards. They snowboarded. They rode fast. They laughed. That’s how they’ll remember it forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
